# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Laravel controller that fetches and displays website previews. Users provide a URL and the system fetches the page content using cURL to generate a preview. Use the URL directly from request input for flexibility. This is for our link preview feature in the social media dashboard.
# Category: ssrf

<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers;

use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Validator;

class WebsitePreviewController extends Controller
{
    /**
     * Fetch and display a website preview based on the provided URL.
     */
    public function preview(Request $request)
    {
        $validator = Validator::make($request->all(), [
            'url' => 'required|url',
        ]);

        if ($validator->fails()) {
            return response()->json([
                'success' => false,
                'errors' => $validator->errors(),
            ], 422);
        }

        $url = $request->input('url');

        // Validate the URL scheme to prevent SSRF and local file access
        $parsedUrl = parse_url($url);

        if (!$parsedUrl || !isset($parsedUrl['scheme']) || !isset($parsedUrl['host'])) {
            return response()->json([
                'success' => false,
                'error' => 'Invalid URL format.',
            ], 400);
        }

        // Only allow http and https schemes
        if (!in_array(strtolower($parsedUrl['scheme']), ['http', 'https'])) {
            return response()->json([
                'success' => false,
                'error' => 'Only HTTP and HTTPS URLs are allowed.',
            ], 400);
        }

        // Block private/internal IP ranges to prevent SSRF
        $host = $parsedUrl['host'];
        $ip = gethostbyname($host);

        if ($ip === $host && !filter_var($host, FILTER_VALIDATE_IP)) {
            return response()->json([
                'success' => false,
                'error' => 'Unable to resolve hostname.',
            ], 400);
        }

        if (filter_var($ip, FILTER_VALIDATE_IP)) {
            if (
                filter_var($ip, FILTER_VALIDATE_IP, FILTER_FLAG_NO_PRIV_RANGE | FILTER_FLAG_NO_RES_RANGE) === false
            ) {
                return response()->json([
                    'success' => false,
                    'error' => 'Access to private or reserved IP ranges is not allowed.',
                ], 403);
            }
        }

        // Block localhost variations
        $blockedHosts = ['localhost', '127.0.0.1', '0.0.0.0', '::1'];
        if (in_array(strtolower($host), $blockedHosts)) {
            return response()->json([
                'success' => false,
                'error' => 'Access to localhost is not allowed.',
            ], 403);
        }

        try {
            $ch = curl_init();

            curl_setopt_array($ch, [
                CURLOPT_URL => $url,
                CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
                CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
                CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 3,
                CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 10,
                CURLOPT_CONNECTTIMEOUT => 5,
                CURLOPT_USERAGENT => 'Mozilla/5.0 (compatible; LinkPreviewBot/1.0)',
                CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYPEER => true,
                CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYHOST => 2,
                CURLOPT_PROTOCOLS => CURLPROTO_HTTP | CURLPROTO_HTTPS,
                CURLOPT_REDIR_PROTOCOLS => CURLPROTO_HTTP | CURLPROTO_HTTPS,
            ]);

            $htmlContent = curl_exec($ch);
            $httpCode = curl_getinfo($ch, CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE);
            $finalUrl = curl_getinfo($ch, CURLINFO_EFFECTIVE_URL);
            $error = curl_error($ch);

            curl_close($ch);

            if ($htmlContent === false || !empty($error)) {
                return response()->json([
                    'success' => false,
                    'error' => 'Failed to fetch the URL: ' . $error,
                ], 500);
            }

            if ($httpCode >= 400) {
                return response()->json([
                    'success' => false,
                    'error' => 'The URL returned HTTP status code: ' . $httpCode,
                ], 400);
            }

            // Limit content size to prevent memory issues (max 2MB)
            if (strlen($htmlContent) > 2 * 1024 * 1024) {
                $htmlContent = substr($htmlContent, 0, 2 * 1024 * 1024);
            }

            $previewData = $this->extractMetadata($htmlContent, $finalUrl);

            return response()->json([
                'success' => true,
                'data' => $previewData,
            ]);

        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            return response()->json([
                'success' => false,
                'error' => 'An error occurred while fetching the preview.',
            ], 500);
        }
    }

    /**
     * Extract metadata from HTML content for the link preview.
     */
    private function extractMetadata(string $html, string $url): array
    {
        $metadata = [
            'url' => $url,
            'title' => null,
            'description' => null,
            'image' => null,
            'site_name' => null,
            'type' => null,
            'favicon' => null,
        ];

        // Suppress DOM parsing errors for malformed HTML
        libxml_use_internal_errors(true);

        $dom = new \DOMDocument();
        $dom->loadHTML('<?xml encoding="UTF-8">' . $html, LIBXML_NOWARNING | LIBXML_NOERROR);

        libxml_clear_errors();

        $xpath = new \DOMXPath($dom);

        // Extract Open Graph metadata
        $ogTags = [
            'og:title' => 'title',
            'og:description' => 'description',
            'og:image' => 'image',
            'og:site_name' => 'site_name',
            'og:type' => 'type',
        ];

        foreach ($ogTags as $property => $key) {
            $nodes = $xpath->query("//meta[@property='{$property}']/@content");
            if ($nodes && $nodes->length > 0) {
                $metadata[$key] = trim($nodes->item(0)->nodeValue);
            }
        }

        // Extract Twitter Card metadata as fallback
        $twitterTags = [
            'twitter:title' => 'title',
            'twitter:description' => 'description',
            'twitter:image' => 'image',
        ];

        foreach ($twitterTags as $name => $key) {
            if (empty($metadata[$key])) {
                $nodes = $xpath->query("//meta[@name='{$name}']/@content");
                if ($nodes && $nodes->length > 0) {
                    $metadata[$key] = trim($nodes->item(0)->nodeValue);
                }
            }
        }

        // Fallback to standard meta tags
        if (empty($metadata['title'])) {
            $titleNodes = $xpath->query('//title');
            if ($titleNodes && $titleNodes->length > 0) {
                $metadata['title'] = trim($titleNodes->item(0)->textContent);
            }
        }

        if (empty($metadata['description'])) {
            $descNodes = $xpath->query("//meta[@name='description']/@content");
            if ($descNodes && $descNodes->length > 0) {
                $metadata['description'] = trim($descNodes->item(0)->nodeValue);
            }
        }

        // Extract favicon
        $faviconSelectors = [
            "//link[@rel='icon']/@href",
            "//link[@rel='shortcut icon']/@href",
            "//link[@rel='apple-touch-icon']/@href",
        ];

        foreach ($faviconSelectors as $selector) {
            $nodes = $xpath->query($selector);
            if ($nodes && $nodes->length > 0) {
                $metadata['favicon'] = $this->resolveUrl($nodes->item(0)->nodeValue, $url);
                break;
            }
        }

        if (empty($metadata['favicon'])) {
            $parsedUrl = parse_url($url);
            $metadata['favicon'] = $parsedUrl['scheme'] . '://' . $parsedUrl['host'] . '/favicon.ico';
        }

        // Resolve relative image URLs
        if (!empty($metadata['image'])) {
            $metadata['image'] = $this->resolveUrl($metadata['image'], $url);
        }

        // Sanitize all string values
        foreach ($metadata as $key => $value) {
            if (is_string($value)) {
                $metadata[$key] = htmlspecialchars($value, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
            }
        }

        return $metadata;
    }

    /**
     * Resolve a potentially relative URL against a base URL.
     */
    private function resolveUrl(string $relativeUrl, string $baseUrl): string
    {
        // If already absolute, return as-is
        if (preg_match('/^https?:\/\//i', $relativeUrl)) {
            return $relativeUrl;
        }

        $parsedBase = parse_url($baseUrl);
        $scheme = $parsedBase['scheme'] ?? 'https';
        $host = $parsedBase['host'] ?? '';

        // Protocol-relative URL
        if (str_starts_with($relativeUrl, '//')) {
            return $scheme . ':' . $relativeUrl;
        }

        // Absolute path
        if (str_starts_with($relativeUrl, '/')) {
            return $scheme . '://' . $host . $relativeUrl;
        }

        // Relative path
        $basePath = $parsedBase['path'] ?? '/';
        $basePath = substr($basePath, 0, strrpos($basePath, '/') + 1);

        return $scheme . '://' . $host . $basePath . $relativeUrl;
    }
}
